items.text:
# **Acting Headshot Day - Manchester**

Hi,

I'm currently finalising an Acting Headshot Day in Manchester for the next couple of weeks, with a few performers already lined up.

I'll be working with a limited number of actors on the day to keep each session creative and tailored, with a focus on creating a range of strong, castable looks that showcase different characters and casting types.

I have a couple of remaining spaces available. If you're due a headshot update or looking to broaden your casting range, feel free to comment below or send me a DM for details.

Andrej

[https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk](https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk/)

items.text:
Proud to announce that Tammy Doyle and I have been working on a new short film titled 'Breaking the Cycle'. 

Based on true events, ‘Breaking the Cycle’ tells the story of Mia, a young mother trapped in a volatile relationship with her partner, Darren whiling caring for her newborn baby Conor. As his behaviour worsens, Mia endures physically and emotionally, taking it for the sake of their child. However, when the abuse intensifies and now threatens young Conor, Mia knows she must act. Taking a chance. Leaving the only life she has known and risking everything for the sake of herself and more importantly her child. Making those important steps towards breaking the generational cycle of abuse. 

After some time prepping, we are now ready to cast and seek crew for our short film.

We are looking for a small crew to help on shooting days in departments such as camera, lighting, sound, costume, make up and production assistants. 

Below features the list of characters we are looking to cast:

 

MIA (Early to Mid-20s) - Female

A young mother trying to survive an abusive relationship while caring for her newborn son. Physically and emotionally drained, she feels isolated and unsupported, yet possesses a quiet strength and resilience. Her love for her baby ultimately gives her the courage to escape and rebuild her life.

DARREN (Late 20s) - Male

A volatile, controlling, and increasingly dangerous man. Struggling with alcohol and drug abuse, his behaviour swings between intimidation and violence. He is deeply insecure and becomes jealous of the attention given to his own child, leading to escalating abuse.

DARREN’S FATHER RICHARD (50s–60s) – Male

Dismissive and self-interested, and an abuser himself, he downplays the seriousness of the situation. More concerned about maintaining access to his grandson than Mia’s safety, he represents a generation that avoids confronting abuse directly.

MIA’S SISTER DONNA (20s-30s) – Female (NON-SPEAKING)

Must be able to Drive

Practical and supportive, Mia’s sister helps her escape despite the risks involved. While not deeply involved emotionally, she steps up when it matters, providing a way out when Mia needs it most.

This is a micro-budget project currently, but we are in the process of seeking funding. However, until then, the project is UNPAID, however travel expenses and catering will be covered at the very least. 

If you are interested in the project, please send your applications to shaundaly2510@gmail.com with name, character you would like to audition for or crew role you are interested in, head shots and showreels, past work and other media would be greatly welcomed as well. Deadline for Applications for both Cast and Crew will be on Midnight of July 10th, 2026. With auditions to be held on 15th and 16th July with one day on the Wirral and the other in Liverpool City Centre. More details will be given closer to the time.

A volatile, controlling, and increasingly dangerous man. Struggling with alcohol and drug abuse, his behaviour swings between intimidation and violence. He is deeply insecure and becomes jealous of the attention given to his own child, leading to escalating abuse.

DARREN’S FATHER RICHARD (50s–60s) – Male

Dismissive and self-interested, and an abuser himself, he downplays the seriousness of the situation. More concerned about maintaining access to his grandson than Mia’s safety, he represents a generation that avoids confronting abuse directly.

MIA’S SISTER DONNA (20s-30s) – Female (NON-SPEAKING)

Must be able to Drive

Practical and supportive, Mia’s sister helps her escape despite the risks involved. While not deeply involved emotionally, she steps up when it matters, providing a way out when Mia needs it most.

This is a micro-budget project currently, but we are in the process of seeking funding. However, until then, the project is UNPAID, however travel expenses and catering will be covered at the very least. 

If you are interested in the project, please send your applications to shaundaly2510@gmail.com with name, character you would like to audition for or crew role you are interested in, head shots and showreels, past work and other media would be greatly welcomed as well. Deadline for Applications for both Cast and Crew will be on Midnight of July 10th, 2026. With auditions to be held on 15th and 16th July with one day on the Wirral and the other in Liverpool City Centre. More details will be given closer to the time.
items.title: Proud to announce that Tammy Doyle and I have been working on a new short film titled 'Breaking the Cycle'.

CASTING CALL: Westhead

We are casting for THREE main roles for an upcoming short film to be filmed in Salford over 3-4 days in July 2026.

The film will be a part of the University of Salford MA Film Production: Major Project module. Written and directed by Hervey Bracken.

Please read the slides above for information on auditions via self-tape. Please share to actors who may be interested.

Email for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call Westhead Synopsis: Charlie. a teenage boy, is kicked out of school after a fight. He then must grapple with the repercussions and where he can go next. A film exploring neurodiversity in a UK school system. Filming in Salford/Manchester w/c 13th July-- or --W/c 20th July 2026 University of Salford MA Film Production short film Unpaid role as this is a student project but hoping to offer funds for travel and food. Contact: poemadjacentproductions@gmail.com for more information n auditions via self-tape. Please include character name in subject line. Deadline lune 29th.'

NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

Bezpieczeństwo to nasz priorytet. 🔐
W naszej bazie aktorów zdjęcia i profile  podopiecznych nie są dostępne dla każdego w sieci. Dostęp do bazy mają wyłącznie zweryfikowani reżyserzy i twórcy projektów. Twoja (lub Twojego dziecka) prywatność jest u nas w 100% bezpieczna.
Chcesz spróbować swoich sił w reklamie, filmie, serialu w profesjonalnych warunkach? Zapraszamy do naszej agencji!

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do ról 
Z TEKSTEM  - gangusów, bandytów i innych rzezimieszków.

Role płatne w zależności od wielkości: 
300 zł - 600 zł netto / dzień

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

🎬🎬🎬Casting do Programu TV realizowanego dla jednej z dziecięcych stacji telewizyjnych 
Poszukujemy Dzieci w wieku 6-8 lat - (z doświadczeniem telewizyjnym) komunikujących się w języku angielskim 🎬🎬🎬

Zdjęcia będą realizowane w Warszawie w dniach 15-19  Lipca na zgłoszenia czekamy JUŻ DZIŚ (termin zgłoszeń do 30 Czerwca) 
Rodziców dzieci z AKTUALNYMI ZGODAMI  PIP zapraszamy do zgłoszeń poprzez wiadomość 
e-mail na adres: statysci@profesjatv.pl  w temacie wiadomości wpisujemy: DZIECI 

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
•Imię i nazwisko dziecka
• telefon kontaktowy do opiekuna 
• wizytówka z linkiem do YouTube lub Vimeo (nie wysyłamy wizytówki z załączniku wiadomości jako plik video TYLKO I WYŁĄCZNIE LINK do YouTube lub Vimeo) 

Odezwiemy się do wybranych Osób 

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń Osoby z Warszawy i okolic, nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu czy noclegu 

Pozdrawiamy 🙂 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych RODO dla PROFESJA TV

Cześć Warszawo! 😊

Poszukuję statystów do reklamy na plan zdjęciowy 29.06 (poniedziałek).

👥 Kogo szukamy?

• Kobiety i mężczyźni

• Wiek: 20–45 lat

🎥 Co gramy?

• Klientów sklepu

• Zdjęcia plenerowe

⏰ Uwaga!

Plan może rozpocząć się bardzo wcześnie rano, dlatego proszę o zgłoszenia wyłącznie osoby w pełni dyspozycyjne.

💰 Stawka: 160 zł

Płatne po planie.

📩 Zgłoszenia SMS

797 169 069

z dopiskiem: „Sklep 29.06”

W wiadomości proszę podać:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcie twarzy

• aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki

❗ Proszę o zgłoszenia osób zdecydowanych – kandydatury na bieżąco przekazuję do produkcji.

📅 Do wybranych osób odezwę się najpóźniej do 26.06 do końca dnia.

Zapraszam do zgłoszeń! 😊

Marta Filmakcja 🥰🎬✨

items.text: New Casting Call 🎥🎥🎥🎥🎥

sharedPost.text:
Excited to Announce Casting Calls for my NEW MOVIE & First TUBI FEATURE 
 Delgado Heart Studio’s LLC Presents 

￼CUFFED TO A HEADCASE 

Comedy/Romance ￼
WRITTEN: BY Mal
Director:Mal
Camera/Editor Paul Egrie duos are back ￼
Film Location: Orlando/Polk County 
Filming Dates: TBD
NON-PAY
Food,Credit Provided 
Submit headshots,reels if you have & any experiences.. 
EMAIL: Delgadoheartstudios@gmail.com
NO DMS PLEASE EMAIL!!!!!!! 

Logline:
A reckless smooth-talker with a long history of legal trouble is sentenced to six weeks of police ride-alongs, but when he falls for the tough female cop assigned to supervise him, he must prove he can leave scams, bad friends, and bad decisions behind before love becomes another case he messes up!!

OFFICER LENA RIVERA Lead Role

Age: early 30s/late 40s
Role: Female lead / no-nonsense police officer
Type: Strong romantic comedy lead

 Breakdown:
Lena is a disciplined, tough, professional police officer who believes in rules, order, and accountability. She is not easily impressed and has no patience for Mal’s excuses. She sees right through his charm.

Personality:
Serious, sharp, witty, controlled, strong, protective, secretly warm.

Comedy Style:
Dry humor, deadpan reactions, sharp comebacks.

THE JUDGE Day Player
Male/female
Age: late 30s-late 40s 
Role: Authority figure who sentences Mal
Type: Comedy courtroom character

 Breakdown:
The Judge has seen Mal too many times and is tired of his excuses. Instead of throwing him in jail, the Judge gives him a punishment that might actually change him: a court-ordered police ride-along.

Personality:
Tired, sarcastic, strict, funny without trying.

PUBLIC DEFENDER Day Player
Male/Female
Age: 30s / 40s
Role: Mal’s overwhelmed lawyer
Type: Supporting comedy character

Breakdown:
The Public Defender has probably defended Mal more than once and is exhausted by his mouth. They try to keep Mal quiet in court, but Mal keeps making things worse.

Personality:
Stressed, practical, embarrassed, impatient.

DESK SERGEANT Day Player
Male/female
Age: 40s / 50s
Role: Police station gatekeeper
Type: Supporting comic authority

 Breakdown:
The Desk Sergeant works the front desk at the police station and instantly knows Mal is the community service guy. He has seen every type of troublemaker and is not impressed by Mal’s charm.

Personality:
Blunt, sarcastic, old-school, funny.

SUIT GUY Day Player 
Age: 30s / 40s
Role: Angry citizen getting ticketed
Type: One-scene comedy character

 Breakdown:
A businessman who parks illegally and then complains when he gets a ticket. He represents the everyday people Lena has to deal with and gives Mal a chance to make the situation worse with jokes.

Personality:
Entitled, annoyed, impatient.

PIZZA DELIVERY DRIVER Day Player
Male 
Age: mid 20s / early 30s
Role: Young driver pulled over by Lena
Type: Small emotional turning-point character

 Breakdown:
A nervous young pizza delivery driver who runs a stop sign because he is scared of losing his job. Mal notices the situation and helps Lena see there is more going on than just a traffic violation.

Personality:
Nervous, hardworking, apologetic.

COMMUNITY CENTER KIDS

Age: Children / young teens
Role: Neighborhood youth
Type: Heartwarming supporting characters

 Breakdown:
The kids are part of the community outreach program. They ask honest, funny questions and help reveal Mal’s softer side. Around them, Mal becomes less of a clown and more of a mentor.

Personality:
Curious, honest, funny, innocent.

KID #1 Day Player 

Age: Around 10-14
Role: Child who questions Mal

 Breakdown:
This kid asks Mal if he is a bad guy. It forces Mal to think about how people see him and whether he really wants to keep being that person.

KID #2 Day Player 

Age: Around 10–14
Role: Curious kid at the community center
 Breakdown:
This kid asks what bad choices Mal made, pushing Mal to explain his mistakes in a simple, honest way.

BARISTA Day Player 
Female 
Age: 20s / 30s
Role: Coffee shop worker
Type: Final scene comedy support

Breakdown:
The Barista appears during Mal and Lena’s first real date. They add a small comedic beat when Mal nervously orders coffee.
Personality: Casual, observant.

MAL’S FRIEND RICO Supporting Role 
Male mid 30s/ early 40s
Role: Bad influence
Personality: slick, shady, always smiling like he’s hiding something. 

Breakdown: 
A shady friend who still tries to pull Mal back into scams, fake parking permits, or illegal shortcuts. This character tests whether Mal has really changed.

LENA’S PARTNER Supporting Role
Male early 30s/ early 40s
Role: officer Brooks who questions Lena’s patience with Mal

Breakdown:
Could add comedy and tension by teasing Lena about Mal while warning her not to get emotionally involved.

MAL’S MOTHER OR AUNT Day Player 
Female: mid 40s/late 50s 
Ethnicity : Spanish 
Role: Family heart

Breakdown:
A family member who loves Mal but is tired of his nonsense. They could reveal that Mal has always had potential but keeps wasting it.

COMMUNITY CENTER DIRECTOR Day Player 
Female early 40s/ late 50s ￼
Role: Mentor figure

Breakdown:
Runs the center and sees Mal connecting with the kids. Could encourage Mal to volunteer after his sentence ends

media.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎'স্টার ইনস্টিটিউট অফ অ্যকিং স্বপ্ন আপনার, দায়িত্ব আমাদের! বিশেষ অফার: কোর্স চলাকালীন নিশ্চিত কাজের সুযোগ! ভ্র্তি ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- ثث মাসিক ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- অনলাইন এবং অফলাইন কোর্স ১০০% কাজের সুযোগ (ফিচার ফিলা, ওয়েব সিরিজ, সিরিয়াল) থিওুরি এবং প্র্যাটিক্যাল শিক্ষা গুণী শিল্পীদের সান্নিধ্যে প্রশিক্ষণ ভিড় না হারিয়ে, নিজেকে গড়ে তুলুন STAR INSTITUTE ACTING OF ভ্তির জন্য যোগাযোগ করুন E 9432846525 হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: 9432846525‎'‎

items.text:
🎭 Looking for actors, performers, models, and outgoing personalities who love creating memorable experiences!

Hi, my name is Haley! A little over a year ago, I started Coast 2 Coast Bubbles, a live entertainment company that brings the magic of giant bubbles to parties, festivals, schools, corporate events, and community gatherings.
Business is booming, and we're looking for more Bubble Artists to join our team!

If you love performing, engaging with crowds, creating magical moments, and bringing energy to events, this might be the perfect fit.
No bubble experience needed—we provide paid training! We're simply looking for reliable, professional, charismatic people who enjoy making people smile.

📍 Hiring in:�• Los Angeles�• South Orange County�• North Orange County�• Inland Empire�• San Diego

📅 Schedule:�Primarily weekends (ideal availability: 8 weekend days per month, Saturdays and/or Sundays)
Also seeking candidates with weekday availability!

✨ Perks:�• Highly competitive pay�• Compensated travel�• Paid training�• Tips�• A genuinely fun and joyful job�• Flexible, event-based scheduling

Interested? Send me a DM for more information!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDIE CATWOMAN SHORT FILM
An upcoming independent short film is now casting for the lead role of Catwoman. Role is Unpaid but budget can be provided for fuel or travel!

Director: Maddi Egan

Producer: Jessalynn Mackenzie

Role: Catwoman / Selena Kyle

Gender: Female  

Age Range: 18–25  

Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds  

Location: Los Angeles Area

Shooting period: Mid September

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is preferred but not essential.

To Apply:  

Please send your CV, headshots, and any relevant showreel material to eganmaddi1@gmail.com  

Exact Filming dates and exact locations will be shared with shortlisted applicants.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.

items.text:
James Connolly Actor - original new monologue “Night in the Garden” Part 1
🤩🥳🎭🎬❤️🙌

James Connolly - my new fictional monologue for Pride month - Callum 20-something gay guy has escaped into the solitude of a Hampstead garden to escape a late fetish/BDSM party gone wrong - 😱🤩🥳🎭🎬🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️❤️🙌

West Midlands productions of The Crucible, Journey’s End & Talking Heads - West End variety & musical theatre tours 2006 - 2008 - 

Featured background extra roles in 

“Mary Queen of Scots” feature film 2018

“Everybody’s Talking About Jamie” film 2019

Passenger music video 2020 - -

To contact me for possible casting opportunities:

Mob: 07852116434 

Email: jamcon1981@gmail.com

Spotlight profile: 

https://app.spotlight.com/1977-8941-9776

items.text:
Love queer cabaret? Join us tomorrow, Friday 19 June, as Queer Theatre brings 12 brilliant queer cabaret artists to the Two Brewers in Clapham for a big, sexy night of music, comedy, drag, spoken word, theatre and beautiful queer chaos.

Hosted by our very own Josh Sanchez, with Bran Isabella, Crispin Dipp, Gareth Williams, Grace Lightning, The W*nkers, Lady Harmony Heaven, Lee Campbell, Ryan Graham Hinds, Sir Lady Afrique, Sophia Kleanthous and Victor Von Plume.

Social by design. Hop on different tables to meet other queer creative people, plus special guests, main-stage cabaret afterwards and a DJ until 4am.

🎟️ Tickets are only £20 and now limited. Book via the Queer Theatre website. All profits supporting LGBTQIA+ theatre-projects.

Hi all my name is Rebecca Walshe and I am 27 years old . I am an Actress and creative from the West Midlands, Worcestershire in the UK.

I am looking to collaborate with all creatives and filmmakers, actors to try and create something new and exciting together. I also enjoy writing along with acting. I’m particularly interested in telling unique and compelling stories along with horror.

Feel free to drop me a dm and let’s chat 🙂🙂🙂

items.text: Monday 29th - NEW ROUTINE! Great time to jump in…… just £3 for your first class!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

🎬 Huge congratulations to our talented adult actor Jonny on securing a role in an upcoming feature film through our talent agency. 

Many of you will also know Jonny as our very own Dewey Finn (Jack Black) in School of Rock. We are incredibly proud of his achievement and can’t wait to see him shine on the big screen and stage.

Why not come and see Jonny live in action at the Storyhouse Theatre, Chester from 13th-15th August as he leads our fantastic cast in School of Rock🎸🤘

Well done, Jonny - here’s to many more exciting opportunities ahead!

#FeatureFilm #SchoolOfRock #StoryhouseTheatre #Chester #MajesticAcademy

items.text:
LADBible Casting!

I'm looking for genuine, die-hard football fans aged 18+ with a strong story to back why. Examples such as running a community football group, or events, maybe you missed a special lifetime event to attend a match, couples who have attended matches together for over 40+ years etc. All unique stories welcome. These are for shoots taking place in London, Manchester, Liverpool and Birmingham throughout June and each participant will receive a fee of £2000 for participation. For more information please email erica.stein@ladbiblegroup.com

items.text:
**TRÓJMIASTO • 27-30.06.2026 • AKTORZY**

Cześć, do internetowego serialu fantasy osadzonego w średniowiecznych realiach, szukamy parę głównych ról męskich - mnichów i zbrojnych zakonu.

Pierwsze zdjęcia odbędą się od **27 do 30.06.2026** w Trójmieście, natomiast nie będą to oczywiście jedyne i ostatnie dni, dlatego szukamy osób do stałej współpracy. Produkcja niskobudżetowa – przewidziane wynagrodzenie dla aktorów, ustalane indywidualnie.

Dalej prowadzimy nabór do ról:
• Ilarion (28-39 lat)
• Seweryn (27-32 lata)
• Romuald ( -30 lat)

Poniżej znajdują się opisy poszczególnych postaci oraz informacje dotyczące zgłoszeń. Zgłoszenia razem z demo i/lub wizytówką proszę wysyłać w komentarzach, lub na mail nikodem.pikczers@fundacjaviart.com

**ILARION (28 i 30.06)**
Mnich i prawa ręka Ojca Izebiusza, głowa klasztoru podczas jego nieobecności. Gorliwy wyznawca, konserwatywny, zasadniczy i przekonany o słuszności swojej wiary. Inteligentny, ale często ocenia ludzi z pozycji wyższości. Postać wyrazista, z wyczuwalną surowością i ideologiczną pewnością siebie. Szukamy Pana od 28 do 39 lat, nie wyższego niż 178 cm wzrostu.

**SEWERYN (27 i 28.06)**
Kapitan milicji. Twardy, doświadczony dowódca, pyszałek z dużym dystansem do świata i ludzi. Pragmatyk, który potrafi zachować zimną krew w kryzysie, a jednocześnie dba o swoich podkomendnych. Charyzmatyczny, stanowczy i naturalnie budzący respekt. Przyjaciel Ojca Izebiusza. Szukamy Pana 27 -32 lata, do 180 cm wzrostu, pałającego się szermierką lub sztukami walki.

**ROMUALD (29.06)**
Klasztorny kucharz o potężnej posturze i równie potężnym charakterze. Mistrz kuchni, perfekcjonista i człowiek żyjący własnym rytmem. Porywczy, wygadany, pełen komediowej energii, ale jednocześnie niezwykle serdeczny i oddany swoim obowiązkom. Szukamy tęgiego Pana do 30 lat i 178 cm wzrostu.

items.text:
**POSZUKUJEMY AKTORA DO ROLI GŁÓWNEJ🎬  ŚLĄSK**

Szukamy chłopca w wieku 7 -11 lat do głównej roli w etiudzie reżyserskiej Szkoły Filmowej im. Krzysztofa Kieślowskiego, pod opieką artystyczną Pawła Maślony. 

**O filmie:**

10-minutowa czarna komedia bez dialogów, osadzona w realiach polskich lat 90. Główny bohater, 9 letni Krzysiu, po raz pierwszy zostaje sam w domu i przeżywa serię komicznych przygód, eksplorując zakazany świat dorosłych.

**Kogo szukamy:**

Chłopiec, 7-11 lat

**Plan zdjęciowy:** Śląsk, 17-21 lipca. 

Zainteresowanych rodziców prosimy o kontakt z krótkim demo/zdjęciem dziecka oraz numerem kontaktowym na mail: **zuzadamowicz@gmail.com**

items.groupTitle: PRACA w produkcji filmowej - Statyści, Aktorzy, Epizodyści, TFP, NON-PROFIT
items.summary:
**POSZUKUJEMY AKTORA DO ROLI GŁÓWNEJ🎬  ŚLĄSK**

Szukamy chłopca w wieku 7 -11 lat do głównej roli w etiudzie reżyserskiej Szkoły Filmowej im. Krzysztofa Kieślowskiego, pod opieką artystyczną Pawła Maślony. 

**O filmie:**

10-minutowa czarna komedia bez dialogów, osadzona w realiach polskich lat 90. Główny bohater, 9 letni Krzysiu, po raz pierwszy zostaje sam w domu i przeżywa serię komicznych przygód, eksplorując zakazany świat dorosłych.

**Kogo szukamy:**

Chłopiec, 7-11 lat

**Plan zdjęciowy:** Śląsk, 17-21 lipca. 

Zainteresowanych rodziców prosimy o kontakt z krótkim demo/zdjęciem dziecka oraz numerem kontaktowym na mail: **zuzadamowicz@gmail.com**
items.title: **POSZUKUJEMY AKTORA DO ROLI GŁÓWNEJ🎬  ŚLĄSK**

items.text:
📣 CASTING – WARSZAWA | REKLAMA | 30.06
Cześć Warszawo! 🎬

Szukam statystów na plan reklamy, który odbędzie się 30.06 (poniedziałek). Plan może rozpocząć się wcześnie rano.

🔹 Kogo szukamy?

Osób w wieku 20–45 lat.

🔹 Co gramy?

Klientów sklepu – zdjęcia plenerowe.

💰 Stawka: 160 zł

Płatne po planie.

🚗 Dodatkowo szukam jednej osoby z samochodem, która zawiezie uczestników na plan (ok. 40 km od Warszawy).

💰 Stawka dla kierowcy: 200 zł + zwrot kosztów paliwa ⛽️

📱 Zgłoszenia SMS na numer: 797 169 069

z dopiskiem: „sklep 30.06”

🚗 Jeśli zgłaszasz się z samochodem, dopisz:

„plus samochód”

oraz informację, czy możemy brać Cię pod uwagę również wyłącznie do statystowania.

W wiadomości proszę podać:

✔️ imię i nazwisko

✔️ wiek

✔️ wyraźne zdjęcie twarzy

✔️ zdjęcie sylwetki

❗ Proszę o zgłoszenia wyłącznie od osób zdecydowanych – kandydatury od razu przekazuję do produkcji.

📅 Do wybranych osób odezwę się najpóźniej do końca dnia 26.06.

Czekam na Wasze zgłoszenia! 😊🥰🎬

Marta Filmakcja 💛

sharedPost.text:
UWAGA - CASTING!

Poszukujemy odtwórczyni jednej z dwóch głównych ról w filmie "Być tu oto", w reżyserii Magdy Matwijow, ze scenariuszem Magdaleny Kućki, produkcji Bahama Films :) 

Zapraszamy do kontaktu!

media.ocrText: Może być zdjęciem przedstawiającym tekst „CASTING DO GŁÓWNEJ ROLI W FILMIE „BYĆ πυ OTO POSZUKUJEMY DZIEWCZYNKI (12-14 LAT) POłUDNIOWY TYP URODY ·KOCHA ŚPIEWAĆ ·LUBI PłYWAĆ JEST ODWAŻNA Zgłoszenia imię nazwisko wraz z aktualnym zdjęciem kontaktem do rodzica prosimy wysyłać na adres: casting casting@bahamafilms.pl”

items.text:
CASTING – POSZUKUJEMY MODELKI 45+ DO APLIKACJI O ZDROWIU

Do realizacji materiałów wideo z ćwiczeniami dla aplikacji wspierającej zdrowie szyi i kręgosłupa poszukujemy modelki:

Kobieta 45+

Wymagania:

• jasne włosy (średniej długości lub dłuższe)

• zadbana aparycja, czysta skóra, brak tatuaży

• wysportowana, szczupła sylwetka

• dobra postawa ciała

Mile widziane doświadczenie związane z fitnessem lub aktywnością fizyczną, ponieważ ważne będzie technicznie poprawne wykonywanie ćwiczeń.

Ćwiczenia nie są wymagające fizycznie – aplikacja skupia się na zdrowiu szyi i pleców.

📍 Warszawa

📅 3 dni zdjęciowe na początku lipca

Przed zdjęciami odbędą się również 2 dni prób (po ok. 6 godzin każda).

💰 Projekt płatny.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać WYŁĄCZNIE na adres:

casting.shootins.warsaw@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy załączyć:

• zdjęcie dobrze widocznej twarzy

• zdjęcie całej sylwetki

• krótką informację o sobie

• informację o swojej dostępności w terminie pomiędzy 29 czerwca a 12 lipca

Referencje zamieszczam poniżej.

items.text:
**Może czas wykorzystać swoją energię w nowym formacie? ✨**

Szukamy osób z doświadczeniem w animacji, eventach, obsłudze klienta, sporcie, tańcu lub podobnych obszarach.

Jeśli dobrze czujesz się w kontakcie z ludźmi i potrafisz tworzyć atmosferę — **możesz odnaleźć się w roli instruktora ruchu i tańca w Arthur Murray!**

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia w prowadzeniu zajęć tanecznych — wszystkiego nauczymy Cię krok po kroku.

**Co zyskujesz?**
🎓 pełne szkolenie od początku
🌍 rozwój w międzynarodowej sieci
👥 klientów od studia
📈 jasną ścieżkę rozwoju
💃 codzienny kontakt z ludźmi, ruchem i emocjami
💰 wynagrodzenie 6500–9000 zł

📍 Wrocław / Warszawa

**Brzmi jak coś dla Ciebie?**
📩 Wyślij CV: arthurmurray.hr@gmail.com
📞 WhatsApp: +48 574 780 210

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and text that says 'Arthurt Arthur Murray DanceCenters Lubisz aktyu aktywność i kontakt z ludźmi? Zostań instruktorem w Arthur Murray DOŁĄCZ DO NAS'

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL | MIAMI AREA

Seeking a REAL breastfeeding mom and baby for an upcoming commercial campaign for a breastfeeding product.

👩 Mom:
• Ages 25–40
• Currently breastfeeding
• Warm, natural, and comfortable on camera

👶 Baby:
• Currently breastfeeding
• Preferably 3–8 months old

💰 Compensation:
$2,000 for mom and baby

📸 Photo & Video Campaign

📅 Submission Deadline: June 24, 2026
🎬 Shoot Date: June 30, 2026

To submit, please send:
• Mom’s name and age
• Baby’s age
• City of residence
• Recent photos of mom
• Recent photos of baby
• Photo together
• Self-tape following casting instructions

Email submissions to: apointofviewproductions@gmail.com

Please share with any breastfeeding moms who may be interested!

#MiamiCasting #CastingCall #MiamiMoms #BreastfeedingMom #CommercialCasting #SouthFloridaCasting #MiamiTalent #MomAndBabyCasting #CastingMiami

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – EXTRAS NEEDED 🎬

NON-UNION EXTRAS WANTED - TAMPA / ST.PETE

KILL MATCH is looking for approximately 20 extras for an upcoming filming day!

📅 Filming Date: Saturday, June 27, 2026

📍 Location:
901 49th St S
Gulfport, FL 33707

🕗 Time:
8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

👥 Ages:
18–30 years old

💰 Compensation:
Non-Paid / Volunteer Opportunity

🎥 What You'll Receive:
• IMDb Credit
• On-Set Experience
• Networking Opportunities
• Behind-the-Scenes Access
• Snacks & Refreshments
• Be Part of an Exciting Independent Action Series

👕 Wardrobe Requirements:
• ALL BLACK CLOTHING
• Cult-like / disciple-style street gang appearance
• NO branded clothing
• NO visible logos
• Dark shoes preferred

We're looking for reliable, professional individuals who can follow direction and help bring this scene to life.

If interested, please email us @ UniekStylz@gmail.com

• Name
• Age
• Recent Photo
• Contact Information

Come be part of the world of KILL MATCH and help us bring this story to life! ♟️🎬

#KillMatch #CastingCall #ExtrasNeeded #NonUnion #FloridaActors #FloridaFilm #GulfportFL #TampaActors #IndieFilm #FilmCasting #SupportIndieFilm

items.text:
Paul Vaughan
Aspiring Actor | Supporting Artist – Project 79 | 11+ Years Security & Events Experience | Birmingham, UK

Paul Vaughan is an aspiring actor based in Birmingham, UK, who is currently building his experience within the film and television industry. He has worked as a Supporting Artist on the Bollywood feature film Project 79, gaining valuable experience on a professional film set and developing a strong understanding of production environments.

Alongside his acting ambitions, Paul has over 11 years of experience working in the security industry, including at some of the UK's largest events. This background has equipped him with excellent communication skills, professionalism, adaptability, and the ability to remain calm under pressure.

Passionate about film and television, Paul is actively seeking acting opportunities to further develop his craft and gain more on-screen experience. He brings a strong work ethic, a professional attitude, and a commitment to continuous growth as he works towards establishing a successful acting career.

If anyone can help me with any kind of work please message me 

Thank you

items.text:
🌟 SEARCH FOR A STAR WITH KERRY ELLIS! 🌟
Are you a talented young performer who would love the opportunity to take to the stage?

West End star Kerry Ellis and the Perform Now team have an incredible opportunity that you won’t want to miss!

🎤 We are searching for one outstanding solo performer to take to the stage during Kerry Ellis’ “Rock Anthems” Tour.

This is your chance to perform in front of a live audience and showcase your talent alongside one of musical theatre’s leading stars.

✨ Think you’ve got what it takes?

Find out more and enter now at:

www.performnow.co.uk⁠￼

Kerry will also be teaching and scouting at our ICONS week 10-14th August ArtsEd LONDOM 

Good luck from all of us at Perform Now and Kerry Ellis! 🍀

#PerformNow #SearchForAStar #KerryEllis #YoungTalent #YoungPerformers #MusicalTheatre #StageStars #WestEnd #PerformingArts

Hey everyone, I need some extras to take part in a shoot this coming Sunday, June 21st starting at 9am till about 1pm in downtown Denver.

WHAT:  Short film shooting from 9am-1pm.  The scene will be the start of a wedding reception.

WHERE: Downtown Denver.

NEEDED:  5-10 extras, ages 20-50. 

I'll provide a pizza lunch for everyone!  If interested, shoot me an email at brettmanero@gmail.com.  Thanks :)

items.text:
CASTING CALL
SPIN CYCLE

Student Short Film | Aurora Cinematic Arts Department

Non-Union | Unpaid | Meals Provided

Casting Italian, Italian-American actors for Spin Cycle, a dark crime-horror short film produced through the Aurora Cinematic Arts Department.

This project is intended for actors looking to gain on-set experience, build their reel, and collaborate with other filmmakers.

“In a neighborhood ruled by organized crime, a simple cleanup job leads two wiseguys down a path of secrets, paranoia, and something lurking in their territory.”

SHOOTING LATE AUGUST EARLY SEPTEMBER, DATES TBD

SEEKING:

- JOSEPH CARUSO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 25-35

A capable mob hitman with sharp instincts and a quiet intensity. Joseph is observant, cautious, and far more intelligent than his peers give him credit for.

Lead Role

- CHRIS

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 22-30

Joseph's longtime friend and partner. Quick-witted, sarcastic, and constantly trying to lighten the mood. Chris often serves as comic relief but proves loyal when things become dangerous. A natural talker with strong comedic timing.

Supporting Role

- FRANK PALMIERI

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 55-70

An aging but powerful mafia boss. Frank is intimidating, sharp-tongued, and commands attention the moment he enters a room. He expects competence and has little patience for excuses.

Supporting Role

- MR. TEDESCO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 50-65

A burly neighborhood figure with a rough exterior and suspicious nature. Tedesco carries himself like someone who has survived a lifetime of street politics. Appears in several key scenes.

Supporting Role

- YOUNG MAN

Male | Italian / Italian-American Preferred | 18-25

A curious and seemingly harmless young man. Charming but slightly suspicious. Limited screen time.

Day Player

- BUTCHER 1

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A nervous worker involved in a gruesome operation. Physical role with minimal dialogue.

Featured Supporting

- BUTCHER 2

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A silent butcher working behind the scenes of the operation. Intimidating physical presence preferred.

Featured Supporting

- CULT MEMBERS

Male or Female | Any Ethnicity | 18-60

Members of a bizarre underground cult. Physical performers comfortable with stunt-style movement and horror elements are encouraged to submit.

Background / Featured Background

TO SUBMIT

Please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (preferred)

• If you do not have a reel, a short monologue is acceptable

Contact

kleverfilms.st@gmail.com

Please include the role(s) you are interested in and any relevant acting experience.

Non-Union • Unpaid • Aurora Cinematic Arts Department Student Production

🦋 Exciting Opportunity! 🦋 

Blue Butterfly is delighted to be offering Commercial & Contemporary Dance classes in partnership with Eastleigh Active for children and young people aged 5–16 years.

These fun and easy-to-follow classes are perfect for anyone looking to get active, build confidence, learn new skills, and enjoy the joy of dance in a friendly and supportive environment.

💙 Ages 5–16
💙 No experience needed
💙 Fun and welcoming atmosphere
💙 Learn, create, and grow through dance

To book your place or find out more information, click here: http://www.eastleigh.gov.uk/eastleighactive

items.title: (no title)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'MADE WITHLOVE CASTING CA LOGLINE- THIS IS A QUIET DRAMA THAT FOLLOWS A FAMILY Y NAVIGATING GRIEF ALL WHILE TRYING TO RECONNECT AS A FAMILY BLACK FEMALE ACTOR (30+) ROLE: ROLE:MOTHER LOCATION: BIRMINGHAM, UK DATES: 14TH-15 JULY 2026 PATOIS: :PREFERRED (NOT ESSENTIAL) UNPAID- TRAVEL EXPENSES AND FOOD PROVIDED ! THIS FILM COVERS TOPICS SOME PEOPLE MAY FIND HARMFUL, SUCH AS DEPRESSION LONLINESS, GRIEF AND LOSS OF LOVED ONE to APPLY: Send your self tape to graciellyhenry@icloud.com orDM@xgraciehenry'

topComments.text: Hi Levi, I have messaged you for more details.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'THE PANTOMIME ADVENTURES OF Νγγζια ល PAID ACTING ROLES We are looking for 4 key lead roles in our annual Christmas Pantomime! If you are talented musical theatre performer- ameatur or professional we are looking for you! A ditzy dame? A cunning villian? A sweet heroine? A lonely toymaker? See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

items.text:
🎬 CREW CALL – UNSPOKEN RHYTHMS 🎬

Für unseren geplanten Kurzfilm „UNSPOKEN RHYTHMS“ suchen wir aktuell engagierte Crew-Mitglieder, die Teil eines besonderen Filmprojekts werden möchten.

UNSPOKEN RHYTHMS ist ein bewegungsbasiertes Drama über Verlust, Identität, Erinnerung und die Kraft von Tanz als nonverbale Sprache. Im Mittelpunkt stehen die junge Tänzerin Titi und die ehemalige Profitänzerin Tammy, deren Lebenswege sich auf unerwartete Weise kreuzen.

🎥 Aktuell suchen wir unter anderem:

• Kameramann / Director of Photography (DoP)• Kameraassistenz (1st AC / 2nd AC)• Setrunner / Produktionsassistenz• Aufnahmeleitung• Regieassistenz• Tonassistenz• Lichtassistenz• Making-of-Fotograf• Behind-the-Scenes Content Creator• Produktionshelfer• Fahrer / Transportassistenz• Setbetreuung• Requisitenassistenz• Kostümassistenz• Maske & Styling• Script Continuity• Social Media & Produktionsdokumentation• Weitere unterstützende Crew-Positionen

Gesucht werden motivierte, zuverlässige und kreative Persönlichkeiten, die Freude daran haben, gemeinsam eine emotionale Geschichte auf die Leinwand zu bringen. Erfahrung ist willkommen, jedoch sind auch engagierte Nachwuchstalente herzlich eingeladen, sich zu bewerben.

📍 NRW, Deutschland📅 Geplanter Drehzeitraum: Oktober 2026🎬 Produktion: Diaspora Films / Edy Production Studios

Der Film behandelt Themen wie Inklusion, Trauma, Heilung, Familie, zweite Chancen und die verbindende Kraft von Kunst und Bewegung.

Als unabhängige Produktion befinden wir uns aktuell in der Finanzierungs- und Vorbereitungsphase. Daher freuen wir uns besonders über Menschen, die Lust haben, Teil eines kreativen Projekts mit gesellschaftlicher Relevanz zu werden und gemeinsam etwas Besonderes entstehen zu lassen.

📩 Bewerbung und Kontakt:edyproductionstudios@outlook.com

Wir freuen uns auf engagierte Menschen vor und hinter der Kamera und darauf, gemeinsam eine besondere Geschichte zum Leben zu erwecken.

Produktion:Diaspora Films / Edy Production Studios

Independent / Low Budget Production

items.text:
Now casting
Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

Looking for a warm, natural actress/supporting artist to play the mum in a children’s music video for an 8-year-old artist.
Looking for a warm, natural actress/supporting artist to play the mum in a children’s music video for an 8-year-old artist.

Role: Mum / mother figure

Age range: 30–45

Shoot: London (Eltham), half day or full day

Date: 4th July 

Fee: Paid, please send your rate

Scene: Short family moment where mum reacts proudly to her son losing his first tooth / growing up fast

Look: Warm, natural, stylish, family-friendly

Requirements: Comfortable working around children, able to sign release form, previous screen experience preferred

Please DM with:

.Recent photo

.Short acting/showreel clip if available

.Location

.Availability

.Half-day/full-day rate

items.text:
Do serialu paradokumentalnego ''Trudne Sprawy'' poszukuję epizodystów Z WROCŁAWIA:

BOŻENA (49 lat) - 6.07.2026
Wygląd: Kwieciste sukienki, biżuteria boho, burza loków. Wyluzowana, uśmiechnięta. 
Szczegóły: Pracuje w salonie fryzjerskim. Energiczna, dowcipna, pełna wigoru, zawsze chętna do pomocy i rozmowy. Nie przejmuje się konwenansami i opinią innych ludzi. 

JERZY (46 lat) – 6.07.2026
Wygląd i szczegóły: Bardzo przystojny i z charyzmą, ale nieco zniszczony życiem. Były alkoholik.

LISTONOSZ (Bliżej nieokreślony wiek) - 7.07.2026
Wygląd: Przeciętny, szczupły mężczyzna w okularach.

MACIEJ (29 lat) - 9 i 10.07.2026
Wygląd: przystojny, dobrze zbudowany
Szczegóły: zaangażowany w sprawy rodzinne, pomocny i bystry

Basia (28 lat) – 9.07.2026
Wygląd: Drobna, ładna
Szczegóły: skromna, pomocna, ma dobre relacje z teściami, ale nie narzuca się

Grażyna (67 lat) - 8.07, 10.07.2026
Szczegóły: Dziarska sąsiadka, lubi rządzić w bloku, miła i sprawiedliwa, pomocna.

Józef (70 lat) – 8.07, 10.07.2026
Wygląd: Zadbany starszy pan, elegancki w starym stylu.
Szczegóły: kulturalny, szarmancki, typ starodawnego dżentelmena.

Grzegorz (40 lat) – 8.07, 10.07.2026
Wygląd: Z lekką nadwagą, ale ubrany nowocześnie.
Szczegóły: Czarny charakter. Typ cwaniaka i oszusta, niekulturalny.

Lekarz geriatra (ok. 50 lat) - 9.07.2026
Szczegóły: Cierpliwy, stonowany.

Ratownicy medyczni (Bliżej nieokreślony wiek) - 9.07.2026
Szczegóły: Dwóch pomocnych, ale stanowczych mężczyzn.

Proszę o zgłoszenia ze zdjęciem, wideo-wizytówką oraz nagraną dowolną sceną castingową, poprzez messenger lub na numer telefonu: 798 970 883. Proszę o wskazanie nazwy roli.

Dziękuję!

Wynagrodzenie zależne od ilości scen, płatne gotówką na planie.

items.text:
SZUKAMY EPIZODYSTÓW ORAZ STATYSTÓW NA PLAN🎬
Studenci SFKK w Katowicach poszukują epizodystów oraz statystów do swojej etiudy! 

🎥Jeśli chcesz zdobyć doświadczenie i brać udział w tworzeniu ciekawego projektu - zapraszamy do współpracy! 

❗️❗️Projekt non-profit❗️❗️

Opis fabuły: Szymon, niepewny siebie pracownik korporacji, który czuje jakby cały świat się z niego śmiał, próbuje zmienić swoje życie naśladując Tomka - nowego pracownika będącego uosobieniem sukcesu.

Kogo szukamy? 

Potrzebujemy statystów, a także epizodystów do następujących ról: 

* Szef (wiek: 45-50 lat) 

* Parkingowy (wiek: 50-55 lat)

* Bywalec siłowni (wiek: 25-30 lat) 

📍Gdzie i kiedy? Katowice, 11 - 14.07.26 (wybrane dni) 

✉️ Jesteś zainteresowany?  

Napisz do nas maila - szymonchlopaczekcasting@gmail.com

W załączniku wyślij swoje portfolio (wpisz wiek i koniecznie aktualne miasto zamieszkania) i opisz swoje doświadczenie filmowe. 

W razie jakichkolwiek wątpliwości, wszelkie pytania można kierować na podanego w poście maila!

items.text:
Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!
items.title: Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Marc Graue is one of the most respected names in the voice over industry, combining decades of professional experience as a voice actor, coach, director, and legendary demo producer. Having worked with thousands of voice actors—from beginners to established professionals—Marc has helped shape successful careers across animation, video games, commercials, promos, audiobooks, and narration.
As the founder of Marc Graue Voice Over Studios, Marc provides world-class voice over coaching, personalized career guidance, professional demo production, audition training, and performance direction. His coaching focuses on helping talent discover their authentic voice, sharpen their acting skills, master today's competitive marketplace, and develop the confidence needed to book more work.
What You'll Get
When you work with Marc Graue, you receive far more than coaching—you gain a trusted mentor with decades of real-world industry experience. You'll learn how to create compelling performances, develop memorable characters, improve audition skills, understand industry expectations, and position yourself for long-term success. Having worked with thousands of voice actors—from beginners to established professionals—Marc has helped shape successful careers across animation, video games, commercials, promos, audiobooks, and narration.
As the founder of Marc Graue Voice Over Studios, Marc provides world-class voice over coaching, personalized career guidance, professional demo production, audition training, and performance direction. His coaching focuses on helping talent discover their authentic voice, sharpen their acting skills, master today's competitive marketplace, and develop the confidence needed to book more work.
What You'll Get
When you work with Marc Graue, you receive far more than coaching—you gain a trusted mentor with decades of real-world industry experience. You'll learn how to create compelling performances, develop memorable characters, improve audition skills, understand industry expectations, and position yourself for long-term success. Whether you're pursuing commercials, animation, video games, audiobooks, or narration, Marc provides honest feedback, practical strategies, and personalized guidance designed to help you stand out.
Why Marc Graue

Through expert coaching, legendary demo production, and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Marc helps voice actors transform talent into opportunity and potential into success.

items.text:
Casting Call - NYC Short

ISO of 2 Black men (20s-early 30s) for a dialogue driven short set in a NYC deli, (Harlem, Washington heights or Brooklyn) 

📍NYC Area
🎥Non-Union *independent/solo*
1 Day shoot (approx- 3-5 hours)
🗓️ TBD *iso of delis that would give permission to shoot*
💰Compensation - $100 + meal/snacks, footage, & credit provided. 

Project-
Two stylish NYers debate the Knicks, Jay-Z, Drake, art, legacy and what makes a moment worth remembering while ordering sandwiches at a neighborhood deli before sitting at a bus stop. 

Think: 
Harlem meets Brooklyn 
Tyler, the Creator + A$ap Rocky
Intelligent, funny, conversational
Natural chemistry and improvisational energy encouraged.

Roles:
MALIK (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Creative. Observant. Thoughtful. The kind of person who sees meaning in everything. Speaks with confidence and curiosity. Equal parts film student, poet, and neighborhood philosopher. 

ZION (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Charismatic. Sharp. Competitive. Loves sports, music, and a good debate. Grounded, funny, and quick on his feet. The type to challenge every point just because he enjoys the conversation. 

Looking for actors who feel authentic to NYC culture and can move naturally between humor, intellect, and everyday conversations; distinctive fashion style aesthetics of Jordan Poole, Tyrese Haliburton, Devin Booker combined with the freeness/energy of Tyler the Creator.

Submissions: 
Headshot
Resume (if available)
Reel or self-tape 
Social handle (optional)

Can send it to Anaselenax@gmail.com!

items.text:
Documentary Casting:

Looking for some interviews for a documentary! Here's who I'm looking to talk to:

-anyone who had fake social media accounts using their photos
-AI-generated images or videos using their likeness
-Unauthorized use of headshots or promotional images
-Deepfake content
-Voice cloning
-Online impersonation
-Someone using their photos without permission
-Catfishing or identity theft
-Scam attempts involving fake voices or videos
-Harassment involving altered or manipulated images
-Concerns about how AI and digital technology may affect personal privacy
-Concerns about AI scanning, digital replicas, or ownership of their image and likeness

You don't need to have a dramatic story or be involved in a legal case. I'm simply interested in learning how these technologies are affecting people working in the entertainment industry and hearing about personal experiences.

If this sounds like something you've experienced, please send me an email with a little information about yourself and your experience. 

All interviews will take place July 22-24 in Los Angeles. They are one hour long, on camera, and paid. 

Please email me at stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com with a little about yourself and your story. Please no requests for crew or anything else. Thanks!

-Vanessa

My style is warm, articulate and trustworthy, with the ability to make complex ideas feel simple, human and easy to understand.

 

Send me an email - tanya@luckyattitude.co.uk

PAID WORK ONLY, happy to travel

items.text:
ACTRESS WANTED – Norfolk, UK
Looking for a female actress aged 25–30 for a small independent horror/thriller film project.

Age: 25–30

Location: Norfolk, UK

Filming: 1 day

Jully 25 

Payment: £100

Experience is welcome but not essential

This is a cinematic short film project with a dark atmospheric style. Please send a recent photo, acting experience (if any), and contact details.

For more information, send a private message.

Paid role (£100)

We have filmed our first concept teaser to show the direction we are taking with the project

In the future, we will also be looking for additional cast members:

4 male actors (30–40 years old) to play members of a cult.

1 actress (40–45 years old) to play a key witness.

1 male actor (around 60 years old) to play the Chief of Police.

If you are interested in future roles, please get in touch and send a recent photo and any acting experience you may have.

items.summary:
ACTRESS WANTED – Norfolk, UK
Looking for a female actress aged 25–30 for a small independent horror/thriller film project.

Age: 25–30

Location: Norfolk, UK

Filming: 1 day

Jully 25 

Payment: £100

Experience is welcome but not essential

This is a cinematic short film project with a dark atmospheric style. Please send a recent photo, acting experience (if any), and contact details.

For more information, send a private message.

Paid role (£100)

We have filmed our first concept teaser to show the direction we are taking with the project

In the future, we will also be looking for additional cast members:

4 male actors (30–40 years old) to play members of a cult.

1 actress (40–45 years old) to play a key witness.

1 male actor (around 60 years old) to play the Chief of Police.

If you are interested in future roles, please get in touch and send a recent photo and any acting experience you may have.

items.text: Monday 29th - New Routine - Start for just £3

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
POSZUKIWANY AKTOR – ROLA EPIZODYCZNA
Poszukujemy młodego aktora do epizodycznej roli w pilocie niezależnego projektu komediowego.

ROLA: Fan, który przypadkowo spotyka głównego bohatera i rozpoczyna z nim zabawną rozmowę. Rola dialogowa.

Wymagania:

- mężczyzna,

- wiek wizualny ok. 21–23 lata,

- swoboda przed kamerą,

- dobra dykcja.

Miejsce zdjęć: woj. mazowieckie (dokładna lokalizacja zostanie podana wybranym osobom)

Planowane zdjęcia: 1 dzień zdjęciowy

Wynagrodzenie: 400 zł za 1 dzień zdjęciowy.

Zgłoszenia:

Prosimy o przesłanie:

- aktualnych zdjęć,

- wieku,

- krótkiej informacji o sobie,

- ewentualnie krótkiego nagrania lub linku do showreela.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres edallas88@gmail.com. Nie odpowiadamy na wiadomości prywatne.

items.text:
Do serialu paradokumentalnego ''Trudne Sprawy'' poszukuję epizodystów Z WROCŁAWIA:

BOŻENA (47-52 lata) - 6.07.2026
Wygląd: Kwieciste sukienki, biżuteria boho, burza loków. Wyluzowana, uśmiechnięta. 
Szczegóły: Pracuje w salonie fryzjerskim. Energiczna, dowcipna, pełna wigoru, zawsze chętna do pomocy i rozmowy. Nie przejmuje się konwenansami i opinią innych ludzi. 

JERZY (44-48 lat) – 6.07.2026
Wygląd i szczegóły: Bardzo przystojny i z charyzmą, ale nieco zniszczony życiem. Były alkoholik.

LISTONOSZ (Bliżej nieokreślony wiek) - 7.07.2026
Wygląd: Przeciętny, szczupły mężczyzna w okularach.

MACIEJ (27-31 lat) - 9 i 10.07.2026
Wygląd: przystojny, dobrze zbudowany
Szczegóły: zaangażowany w sprawy rodzinne, pomocny i bystry

BASIA (26-30 lat) – 9.07.2026
Wygląd: Drobna, ładna
Szczegóły: skromna, pomocna, ma dobre relacje z teściami, ale nie narzuca się

GRAŻYNA (65-69 lat) - 8.07, 10.07.2026
Szczegóły: Dziarska sąsiadka, lubi rządzić w bloku, miła i sprawiedliwa, pomocna.

JÓZEF (60-75 lat) – 8.07, 10.07.2026
Wygląd: Zadbany starszy pan, elegancki w starym stylu.
Szczegóły: kulturalny, szarmancki, typ starodawnego dżentelmena.

GRZEGORZ (38-42 lata) – 8.07, 10.07.2026
Wygląd: Z lekką nadwagą, ale ubrany nowocześnie.
Szczegóły: Czarny charakter. Typ cwaniaka i oszusta, niekulturalny.

LEKARZ GERIATRA (ok. 45-55 lat) - 9.07.2026
Szczegóły: Cierpliwy, stonowany.

RATOWNICY MEDYCZNI (Bliżej nieokreślony wiek) - 9.07.2026
Szczegóły: Dwóch pomocnych, ale stanowczych mężczyzn.

Proszę o zgłoszenia ze zdjęciem, wideo-wizytówką oraz nagraną dowolną sceną castingową, 
poprzez messenger lub na numer telefonu: 798 970 883. 

Wynagrodzenie zależne od ilości scen, płatne gotówką na planie.

Dziękuję!

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -  **Girls' Night Out Short Film
## **We are casting for Girls’ Night Out, a cinematic short film about five Black women from five African nations navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC. Each woman carries something invisible into the night. What they find in each other is what no institution could provide. The film is strictly volunteer based, targeting festival submissions. This is a portfolio piece for everyone involved.**

**We are currently looking for:**
**LEAD ROLES — All five must be women of African descent (OPEN TO ALL BLACK ACTRESSES)**

**AMARA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Sharp, always in motion, a code-switcher. Works in marketing and communications. Must be comfortable switching between Nigerian pidgin and a neutral Canadian accent.**

**NIA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Medical student. Exhausted and brilliant.**

**ZURI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. The anchor. Decisive, warm, composed. Social worker. Needs to know how to drive**

**IMANI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Playful, chaotic, observant. DJ.**

**TONI – East African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Athletic build. A bit of a tomboy. Software engineer. Private.**

**SUPPORTING ROLES & EXTRAS**

**We are intentionally casting to reflect the demographic reality of Vancouver, a city built on Indigenous land and home to one of the most diverse populations in the world. We are particularly interested in hearing from:**

**Black performers**
**Indigenous performers**
**East Asian and South Asian performers**
**White performers**

**For supporting and background roles, all backgrounds are welcome to submit.**

**No acting experience required. If you have never acted before but feel connected to one of these characters please submit. We are looking for truth, not technique.**

**This is an unpaid production (screen credit provided). Food will be provided on set. Some scenes require emotional depth, multiple takes, and reshoots.**

**To submit please send the following to: gnothefilm@gmail.com**

**Headshot or clear selfie**
**Short video introducing yourself (30–60 seconds, just talk to us, INCLUDE: NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION UNION STATUS & CULTURAL BACKGROUND)**
**Reel or any acting experience if available**
**Which role you are submitting for**
**Your contact information and location**

**Filming in Vancouver, BC Late August 2026. Even if you are not submitting, please share this with someone who might be. Every share helps us find the right people.**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL **- "PULSE" Short Film // Non-Union

**Compensation**: Unpaid/Volunteer, Lunch and Crafty Provided

**Location**: Vancouver, BC 

**Shoot Date:** Single Day, Late June/Early July 

**Synopsis**: Chris, an inexperienced superhero known as Pulse, decides he must reveal his secret identity to his girlfriend Rachel, but struggles to find the right way, as the two of them debate the methods of this “reckless hero” over dinner.

If interested, please submit headshots, resume and/or demo reel to: **pulseshortfilm.edc@gmail.com**

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: June 24th, 2026

CASTING FOR A MALE CHILD!!!! MORE ROLES COMING SOON!!!! ATLANTA AND SURROUNDING AREAS!!!!!!!
FILMING SEPTEMBER AND OCTOBER.... WEEKEND FILMING (SATURDAYS AND SUNDAYS)........ALL ACTORS WILL BE PAID!!!!!
          
            CHECK OUT BELOW👇👇
           
👉Speaking role!!!!
👉 Needing a Caucasian little boy 7-9 years old.
👉Only in one scene. Only need for a few hours.
👉If you are interested please email 
BLUESIRENS26@gmail.com
👉Must be able to do self tape. (Side will be provided)
👉Subject line: Male Child 
Please send your name, phone number, email, age, height, weight and three photos.... Casting will contact you and give you more details.

Stary doktor (sześćdziesięcioletni, zmęczony życiem, pedagog, doktor, pierwowzór - Janusz Korczak)

Wolf (oficer niemiecki, popadający w obłęd)

Izaak (dwudziestokilkuletni, żyd, intelektualista, członek partyzantki)

Jakub (dwudziestokilkuletni, żyd, niespokojny, członek partyzantki)

items.text:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9 items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

items.text:
Hello!

We are still casting FEMALE IDENTIFYING ACTORS (40s-60s) who are LOCAL to EAU CLAIRE, WI for a non-union feature shooting this fall entitled **Missing Cody**. *Please only submit if you fit this criteria.*

**Logline: **After the unexpected passing of her parents, a runaway is forced back to her childhood home, reuniting with her estranged siblings to pay off their parents’ debts.

**MISS GENEVIEVE LACORTE (40s-60s, F) FEATURED**

The neighborhood mom - you know the type that makes casseroles for her neighbors. A sweet, material figure who helps Margot through troubles.

If you are interested, please contact missingcodycasting@gmail.com with a headshot, and we will be in touch if we would like to see you!

items.title: Hello!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – "Million Dollar Personality Girl/Boy" (Short Film) 🎬
We are seeking a talented actor with exceptional range for an upcoming artistic short film, "Million Dollar Personality Boy / Girl" (MDPG), set in 1930s Hollywood and scheduled to film this summer.

Role:

BILL "BOJANGLES" ROBINSON

Male/Female African American, Ages 30–60

A legendary tap dancer whose remarkable success cannot shield him from the racial prejudices of the era.

Project Concept:

The film features a brief but powerful conversation between Bill "Bojangles" Robinson and Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major Hollywood studio. Together, they discuss the challenges and triumphs of Black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood.

Production Details:

Genre: Drama

Location: in 

Shoot Dates: Two-day weekend shoot, July 2026 (Exact dates TBD)

One filming location

Compensation: $750 flat rate

IMDb Credit, Meal, and Reel Footage Included

Preferred Qualifications:

Tap dancing experience is a plus (very light choreography required)

Strong acting ability is the primary focus

This is a unique opportunity to portray an iconic figure in Black entertainment history and showcase your talent in a meaningful and memorable role.

To Submit:

Please send your headshot, resume, and reel to:

SteaDr7@gmail.com

Subject Line: BILL SUBMISSION

Questions, recommendations, and referrals are always appreciated.

We look forward to hearing from you! 🎥✨

items.text:
CASTING CALL
For a SCAD senior thesis titled “SHOOTOUT”

It will be filming October 22nd-25th in Savannah, GA

It is paid (amount depends on character) 

Please read each character description as they do have requirements!

If interested please check out the sides at sophidarlingcasting.com or email sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of hockey and text that says 'SHOOTOUT SHOOTING OCT 22ND-OCT 25TH SAVANNAH,GA WHEN THE THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOCKEY TEAM SUSTAINS A CAREER ENDING INJURY HOW FAR WILL SHE GO TO GET HER FINAL SHOT'

May be an image of text that says 'NICOLE BLACKWELL LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY NICOLE IS THE CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND FIONA'S WIFE. SHE IS OVERCONFIDENT, SPORTED, AND BELIEVES SHE HAS TO BE THE BEST. SHE'S BEEN SECRETLY BATTLING A KNEE INJURY SHE HAS TOLD NOBODY ABOUT AND AS A RESULT, SHE BECAME OBSESSED WITH WINNING THE COYNE CUP. SHE UNDERSTANDS WITHOUT THE SURGERY HER CAREER WILL END PREMATURELY, BUT SHE PUSHES BACK BECAUSE SHE IS AFRAID THAT SHE'LL NEVER BE THE SAME PLAYER.'

May be an image of hockey and text that says 'FIONA SALO LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY SHE'S THE ASSIST CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND NICOLE'S WIFE ANO TEAMMATE. SHE'S SOFT SPOKEN, BUT ON THE ICE, SHE IS DOMINANT AND LOUO. FIONA CARES DEEPLY FOR HER WIFE ANO TEAM ANO CAN BRING ANYONE DOWN FROM AN EMOTIONAL OUTBURST. SHE'S USUALLY PRETTY PERCEPTIVE AND NOTICES NICOLE CHANGES IN BEHAVIOR SHE GOES INTO PROTECTIVE MODE WANTING TO SAVE NICOLE FROM HER DESTRUCTIVE TENDENCIES.'

May be an image of basketball and text that says 'COACH BRUCE SUPPORTING 50 60 YEARS OLD WOMAN $150/DAY SHE IS A A FORMER STANDOUT PLAYER AND CURRENT HEAD COACH OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS. SHE WAS VERY SIMILAR TO NICOLE IN HER PLAYING DAYS, NEEDING TO BE THE BEST IN THE TEAM NO MATTER WHAT. AS THE HEAD COACH, SHE'S A NO NONSENSE WOMAN AND THRIVES FOR HER TEAM TO PLAY HARD AND SUPPORT ACH OTHER. SHE IS SECRETLY AWARE OF NICOLE'S INJURY.'

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: East London

If fate handed you an inventory slot, what would you grab? A prop sword, a healing potion, or studio lights to bathe you mates?

This October, JDG presents a charity spectacular built around Master Jonjon's inventive new play: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…". Find out what the story's about: cutt.ly/GFGstory

But here's the glorious part: you can be in it. Sign up: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

Starting early July, we're throwing open the doors to free masterclass workshop rehearsals. Whether you're a seasoned pro or trying something new, you belong here. Wander between departments, crash other people's workshops, build your showreel, learn something new, and meet other drama enthusiasts.

Backstage and cast roles are open. We're hunting for:
Director
Assistant Director
Stage Manager
Assistant Stage Manager
Designer
Sound Designer
Multimedia Designer
Multimedia Operator
Lighting Designer
Lighting Tech
Costume Designer
Props Designer
Set Designer
Front of House Manager
Assistant Front of House Manager
Director of Photography (Photography & Video Recording)

Sign up for your audition: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

The spotlight's on. Let the magic begin.

.

.

#londonevents #auditions #auditioning #thingstodoinlondon #londonplay #eastlondondrama #theatrelondon #londonperformance #eastlondontheatre #eastlondonplays #londontheatre

sharedPost.text:
🍟 "I do not believe in seagulls, although a GULL did steal my battered fish from my hands on a trip to Whitby."

To start our second week of Meet The Cast, we are thrilled to announce the multi-talented Alison Hasler-O’Neill, who will be taking on the challenging role of Renfield!

🎭 About Alison
Alison has been involved in theatre since she was a little girl. She studied for a BA (Hons) in Musical Theatre at the Colchester Institute and undertook professional touring work before taking a break from performing in 2014. For four years, she worked as an Assistant Cruise Director with Royal Caribbean, combining her love of entertainment and audience engagement.
Since relocating to Manchester and joining Whitworth Amateurs, Alison has played a brilliant variety of roles. Her credits include the Fairy in Dick Whittington, the Ogre in Puss in Boots, Nibbles the Rabbit in Alice in Wonderland, Holly in The Wedding Singer, and a place in the ensemble of Joseph and the Amazing Technicolour Dreamcoat. Later this year, she will also be owning the stage as Tina Turner in We Will Rock You!

🦇 On Playing Renfield
"I feel incredibly fortunate to have been cast as Renfield. This will be my first straight acting role since university and one that will undoubtedly challenge me in new and exciting ways. Renfield is a character who leaves no room for shyness or self-consciousness, and I am thrilled to have the opportunity to explore her complexity, embrace the challenge, and bring her to life on stage."

🤪 Strange But True
Despite her traumatic, avian encounter in Whitby (ironically, the very place Dracula lands in England!), Alison stands firm on one absolute truth: "seagulls" do 
not exist.
.🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - Lead Actress for short film "CONCEPTION"
We're looking for our Ellie.

"Conception" is a two-hander drama/sci-fi/horror - one location, one intense relationship, a lot of room for a great performance. Directed by Darren Henderson, produced by myself.

THE ROLE
Acting age 30–35
Ideally (but not exclusively) based in the North West of England
Comfortable with screen acting and playing nuanced, layered characters

THE SHOOT
3 consecutive days between 3–13 September (dates flexible to the right actress)
Filming in Lancaster

A bit of honesty about the project: this is a collaborative passion project. The role is unpaid, but we cover travel, accommodation where it's needed, and food on set. Our producer and crew are experienced - not first-timers - and we already have a fantastic male co-lead attached. Our aim is a calm, supportive set and genuinely strong showreel material, especially for actresses who've built up supporting credits and are ready to carry a lead.

We know paid-only is the right call for a lot of people, and that's completely fair - if it's not for you, no worries at all. If it sounds like your kind of thing, we'd love to hear from you.

📩 To apply, email: darren.a.henderson27@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you.

items.text:
Tonight is a very proud moment🎬

As a Mum/Agent, I couldn’t be prouder to be attending the London screening of *Angel of the North* this evening.

Knowing that Summer-Joules played the supporting lead role of Lucy makes this occasion incredibly special for us. Her hard work, dedication, and commitment to her acting journey have led to this wonderful milestone, and I am so excited to celebrate alongside the amazing talented cast, crew, and creative team behind the film.

A special thank you to Sean, whose talent, vision, and dedication brought *Angel of the North* to life. Not only did he direct this incredible film, but he also delivered a wonderful performance within it. It was a privilege for Summer-Joules to work alongside someone so passionate and committed to their craft. Sean's support, guidance, and belief in his cast helped create a truly memorable experience, and we're incredibly grateful to have been part of his journey with this film.

Wishing everyone involved a fantastic screening tonight. Here’s to an unforgettable evening and the continued success of *Angel of the North*.

#AngelOfTheNorth #LondonScreening #FilmPremiere #ProudMum #SupportingLead

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'OFFICIAL OFFICIALSELECTION SELECTION RAINDANCE FILM FESTIVAL 2026 ANGELNORTH NORTH ANGEL ANGELOFTHENDATH NNI DIGTHORNE SEANCRONIN INS EBANIE ICODOESTESEAUCTUNSW CYBIMS SEANCRONIN SIMSON SEANCRONIN CYBIGGS RAYMONOHDI'
